changes.detail: All five mandatory fields present and valid. execution_model: TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH (corrected from prior NOT_HARDENED attempt). risk_level: HIGH correct — modifies medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml (Intelligence Core adjacent, governs which packages are runtime_active). change_type: MIXED correct — package manifest and frame index metadata updates (CONTENT component) plus activation state change altering runtime authority (BEHAVIOUR-adjacent component). work_id and branch match between front matter.

All 7 required governance input files confirmed present. ADVISORY: knowledge_bus/current/latest_knowledge_status.json does not exist — knowledge_bus/current/ contains only .gitkeep. This file is managed by run_knowledge_package.py KB package lifecycle (backend/scripts/run_knowledge_package.py:24) and is not written until a KB package lifecycle 'start' runs. This sprint does not use that lifecycle; runtime activation mechanism is confirmed via package_manifest.yaml and medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml fields. Cursor must not trigger STOP condition 'runtime activation mechanism cannot be identified' on account of this absent file alone.
changes.file_evidence: knowledge_bus/governance/batch2_promote_1_execution_register_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED; knowledge_bus/governance/batch2_final_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED; knowledge_bus/governance/batch2_promotion_readiness_register_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED; knowledge_bus/governance/medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml — CONFIRMED; knowledge_bus/current/.gitkeep (only file in current/)

changes.detail: 6-package runtime activation candidate set (prompt lines 152-159) verified against both governance registers. batch2_final_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml: all 6 carry final_decision: CLEARED and required_next_action: 'Proceed to BATCH2-PROMOTE-1 controlled promotion sprint' with NO activation caveat. batch2_promote_1_execution_register_v1.yaml: all 6 show post_promotion_state: governance_promoted_pending_runtime_activation and package_validator_status: PASS. Ordering difference: eosinophils_abs_reactive (prompt line 157) appears before eosinophils_abs_hypereosinophilic (prompt line 158); reversed in the register — same set, functionally irrelevant.

Thyroid deferral is now explicit in the prompt (lines 165-191). 4 thyroid packages confirmed governance_promoted in execution register with runtime_activation_changed: false. Final decision register lines 313-315, 333-335, 353-355, 373-374: all 4 thyroid packages have required_next_action containing 'clinical adjudication sign-off still required before activation'. No clinical sign-off record found anywhere in repo. Thyroid exclusion from activation is now hard-coded in the prompt rather than conditional — this resolves the prior architectural concern. Deferred_reason: thyroid_clinical_signoff_required_before_activation is accurate.

10 excluded packages (androgen x8, eGFR x2) match exactly against batch2_final_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml exclude_packages list. All confirmed with final_decision: EXCLUDED. STOP condition 'any excluded package appears in the diff' is present.

Runtime activation mechanism confirmed: (1) medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml — 6 candidate frames currently have promotion_state: compiled_not_promoted and runtime_authority_status: inactive. Activation updates these to promotion_state: runtime_active_canonical and runtime_authority_status: active. Valid value runtime_active_canonical confirmed at validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py:26. (2) package_manifest.yaml — governance_promotion_status field changes from governance_promoted_pending_runtime_activation to reflect active state. No code changes required. STOP condition 'activation would require code changes' will not trigger.
changes.file_evidence: knowledge_bus/governance/medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml:989-990 (compiled_not_promoted / inactive for exertional_muscle_injury frame); backend/scripts/validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py:26-28 (runtime_active_canonical is valid); knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_creatine_kinase_high_exertional_muscle_injury/package_manifest.yaml:13

changes.detail: All Batch 2 frames in medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml (lines 991-1533) currently carry clinical_adjudication_status: required_before_activation — this was set at indexing time. For the 6 runtime activation candidates, this field should be updated to accepted_with_rationale (the valid value used for cleared frames — confirmed at line 109 for creatinine) when activation is recorded, to accurately reflect that BATCH2-CLOSURE-1 cleared them. This is data quality, not a validator constraint — the validator does not enforce any relationship between clinical_adjudication_status and promotion_state. Not a STOP condition. Thyroid frames' required_before_activation remains accurate.
changes.file_evidence: knowledge_bus/governance/medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml:991, 1016, 1100, 1124, 1153, 1178 (six activation candidate frames); medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml:109 (accepted_with_rationale as valid value)

changes.detail: 10 STOP conditions present and well-formed. STOP condition 4 (thyroid packages proposed for activation without sign-off evidence) is new in amended prompt and correctly protects against regression. Phase 2 mandatory STOP gate is explicit, requires human approval phrase 'APPROVE BATCH2 RUNTIME ACTIVATION' before any activation. Closure STOP conditions list all prohibited file changes including thyroid metadata exception.

Prompt prohibits: signal_library.yaml, research_brief.yaml, promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml, thresholds, activation_key, signal_id, clinical wording, frontend, SignalEvaluator, SignalRegistry code, runtime loaders, SSOT, scoring. Out of scope section repeats thyroid activation prohibition explicitly.

New schema correctly adds governance_promoted_package_count, activation_candidate_count, thyroid_deferred_count, deferred_package_count. activation_candidates section (renamed from included_packages) and thyroid_deferred_packages section are new. Schema is coherent with the split between 6 activation candidates and 4 deferred thyroid packages. File does not exist yet — correct, it is a sprint deliverable.

CF-BATCH2-012 (runtime activation of cleared non-thyroid Batch 2 promoted subset) and CF-BATCH2-013 (thyroid clinical sign-off required before thyroid runtime activation) are new items not yet in register — correct. CF-BATCH2-011 confirmed Resolved in register at line 74. CF-BATCH2-007, CF-BATCH2-010, CF-CONTEXT-MOD-3 correctly remain Open.
changes.file_evidence: docs/sprints/launch_core_carry_forward_register.md:70-75 (no CF-BATCH2-012 or CF-BATCH2-013 present — confirmed by grep)

changes.detail: No forbidden files in scope. Sprint touches only: medical_frame_identity_index_v1.yaml, package_manifest.yaml (10 packages), batch2_runtime_activation_execution_register_v1.yaml (new), audit report (new), carry-forward register update. None of these are in the HIGH-risk code paths (backend/core/, run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py, SSOT).
